body_txt: A race of sapient beings is past its prime. There are only a few of them left, and they're slowly dying out. This may be for any of a number of reasons. It may be caused by Creative Sterility — or it may cause it. It could be the result of a Depopulation Bomb or Gendercide . Sometimes the race is almost immortal , and thus suffers from the Immortal Procreation Clause . The race may live in a time that's Just Before the End . They could be dying out because another race has Gotta Kill Them All ; if humanity is the target, it's Kill All Humans . Whatever the reason is, the dying out may be viewed as a tragedy, because someone appreciates the Uniqueness Value of the dying race and so regards them as an Endangered Species . Sometimes the race will be trying to save themselves. This might lead to Only You Can Repopulate My Race . If they accept their fate, they may want to Fling a Light into the Future . In modern fantasy, this is a common trait of Tolkienian-type elves , who are very frequently portrayed as a people who achieved great wonders, mastered magic and science, and built glorious empires — once , but who are now reduced to a few isolated, fading remnants doomed to never reobtain the power and splendor of their golden age even if they can stave off extinction. Dwarves and other "high" fantasy peoples aren't hit with this quite as universally, but it's common for them as well. If the race is reduced to just a single individual , that is the Last of His Kind , not this trope. But then again maybe There Is Another , too. See also Humanity's Wake for when humanity is made extinct. Contrast Racial Remnant for when a race doesn't die out completely. Compare Adam and Eve Plot .
